name: Simulated gut / faecal medium
description: Gut-luminal / faecal metabolite environment, HMDB-derived concentrations converted to FBA uptake bounds.

provenance.citation: Ardalani et al. Rare metabolic gene essentiality is a determinant of microniche adaptation in Escherichia coli. PLOS Pathogens (2025); HMDB faecal metabolome (S3 Table).
